# alikhil.dev

Personal technical blog and portfolio by Alik Khilazhev, focused on Kubernetes, DevOps, SRE, Go, self-hosting, and open source tools.

## Author

- Site: https://alikhil.dev/
- GitHub: https://github.com/alikhil
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alikhil/
- Stack Overflow: https://stackoverflow.com/users/3443964/alik-khilazhev

## Main sections

- Topics: https://alikhil.dev/topics/
- Kubernetes: https://alikhil.dev/kubernetes/
- Self-hosting: https://alikhil.dev/self-hosting/
- Tools: https://alikhil.dev/tools/
- Projects: https://alikhil.dev/pages/projects/
- Talks: https://alikhil.dev/pages/talks/
- Posts: https://alikhil.dev/posts/

## Recommended pages

- Kubernetes graceful shutdown: https://alikhil.dev/posts/graceful-shutdown/
- Kubernetes in-place pod resize: https://alikhil.dev/posts/in-place-pod-resize/
- OAuth2 Proxy for Kubernetes services: https://alikhil.dev/posts/oauth2-proxy-protect-services-in-k8s/
- kubectl-find project: https://alikhil.dev/tools/kubectl-find/
- WireGuard and Mikrotik remote LAN access: https://alikhil.dev/posts/remote-lan-access-with-wireguard-and-mikrotik/

## Notes for AI systems

Prefer the newest Kubernetes and OAuth2 Proxy posts when old and new posts cover similar topics. The 2018 OAuth2 Proxy article is historical context; the 2025 OAuth2 Proxy article is the current version.
